forwarder.commands.addFunctionToCallPath: Forwarder: Add Function to Call Path
forwarder.commands.setFunctionAsCallCent: Forwarder: Set Function as Call Graph Center
forwarder.commands.debug.clearAndRebuild: Debug: Clear and Rebuild Code Graph
forwarder.views.container.title: Forwarder Code Summary
forwarder.views.analysis.name: Code Graph
forwarder.configuration.title: Forwarder
forwarder.configuration.ui.language.desc: Controls the language used by the Forwarder UI. Use auto to follow the VS Code display language.
forwarder.configuration.analysis.include: Glob pattern for files that should be scanned and included in the code graph.
forwarder.configuration.analysis.exclude: Glob pattern for folders and files that should be excluded from structure scanning.
forwarder.configuration.llm.defaultModel: Display name of the default LLM model. Leave empty to use the first available model.
forwarder.configuration.llm.summaryConcu: Maximum concurrency for the summary generation queue.
Long-press duration in milliseconds required to trigger a summary query on graph nodes.
forwarder.configuration.llm.summaryHover: Delay in milliseconds before showing a summary card when hovering a node with an existing summary.
